phrases.text_local: Conhece um restaurante típico perto do hotel?
phrases.pronunciation: koo-NYEH-sih OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo PEHR-too DOO oo-TEHL?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao dono da tasca local. Ele conhece bem os restaurantes típicos da zona.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW DOH-noo DUH TAHSH-kuh loo-KAHL. EH-lih koo-NYEH-sih BAYNG OOSH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh TEE-pee-koosh DUH ZOH-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the local tavern owner. He knows the typical restaurants in the area.

responses.english: Ask the local tavern owner. He knows the typical restaurants in the area.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW DOH-noo DUH TAHSH-kuh loo-KAHL. EH-lih koo-NYEH-sih BAYNG OOSH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh TEE-pee-koosh DUH ZOH-nuh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao dono da tasca local. Ele conhece bem os restaurantes típicos da zona.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Guia viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza o Miradouro da Guia?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee see lo-kah-lee-ZAH oo mee-rah-DOH-roo dah GEE-ah (link final unstressed vowels to following words)
phrases.cultural_note: Offers panoramic views of Cascais bay and is a favorite photography spot.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está junto ao farol.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH ZHOONNG-too OW fuh-RAWL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is right by the lighthouse.

responses.english: Good morning, it is right by the lighthouse.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH ZHOONNG-too OW fuh-RAWL.
responses.french: Bom dia, está junto ao farol.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso alugar um chapéu de sol para a praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo uh-loo-GAHR OONNG shuh-PEHOO DIH SAWL PUH-ruh AH PREYEUH?

likely_response.local: Sim, há um quiosque de aluguer de chapéus de sol na Praia da Guia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEEN, AH OONNG KEEOHSH-kih DIH uh-loo-GEHR DIH shuh-PEHOOSH DIH SAWL NUH PREYEUH DUH GEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is a beach umbrella rental kiosk at Praia da Guia.

responses.english: Yes, there is a beach umbrella rental kiosk at Praia da Guia.
responses.phonetic: SEEN, AH OONNG KEEOHSH-kih DIH uh-loo-GEHR DIH shuh-PEHOOSH DIH SAWL NUH PREYEUH DUH GEEUH.
responses.french: Sim, há um quiosque de aluguer de chapéus de sol na Praia da Guia.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I rent a surfboard?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso alugar uma prancha de surf?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo uh-loo-GAHR OO-muh PRAHNNG-shuh DIH SOO-ruhf?
phrases.cultural_note: O aluguer de pranchas é sazonal, principalmente no verão.

likely_response.local: No posto de aluguer na Praia da Guia.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO POHSH-too DIH uh-loo-GEHR NUH PREYEUH DUH GEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: At the rental counter at Guia Beach.

responses.english: At the rental counter at Guia Beach.
responses.phonetic: NOO POHSH-too DIH uh-loo-GEHR NUH PREYEUH DUH GEEUH.
responses.french: No posto de aluguer na Praia da Guia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Mercado da Guia is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Mercado da Guia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo DUH GEEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Known for fresh fish and cash-only transactions, reflecting local trading traditions.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, desça a Rua da Guia.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, DEHSH-suh AH ROOUH DUH GEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, go down Rua da Guia.

responses.english: Good morning, go down Rua da Guia.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, DEHSH-suh AH ROOUH DUH GEEUH.
responses.french: Bom dia, desça a Rua da Guia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Guia Lighthouse is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente o Farol da Guia?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee FEE-kah eh-zah-tah-MEN-chee oo-fah-ROW dah GEE-ah
phrases.cultural_note: The lighthouse is a historic landmark overlooking the Atlantic, often visited at sunset.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica ao lado do miradouro.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is next to the viewpoint.

responses.english: Good morning, it is next to the viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh OW LAH-doo DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica ao lado do miradouro.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Farol da Guia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW fuh-RAWL DUH GEEUH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Farol da Guia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DUH GEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Guia Lighthouse.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Guia Lighthouse.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DUH GEEUH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Farol da Guia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Guia viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro da Guia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH GEEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: O Miradouro oferece uma vista panorâmica da costa de Cascais.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro da Guia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH GEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Guia Viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Guia Viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH GEEUH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Miradouro da Guia.
